SQLLite.SQL: SELECT REF1.RV_LOW_VALUE As "Code" , REF1.RV_MEANING As "Description" FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF1 WHERE REF1.RV_DOMAIN = 'AE_TYPE' AND REF1.RV_LOW_VALUE IN ( SELECT REF2.RV_MEANING FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF2 WHERE REF2.RV_DOMAIN = 'EVENT_AE_TYPE' AND REF2.RV_LOW_VALUE = ${param.eventId} AND REF2.RV_LOW_VALUE = REF2.RV_LOW_VALUE )
